data.headline: Strategic Commercial Real Estate in DFW
data.body: Institutional-grade advisory for office, retail, industrial, and mixed-use assets across the Dallas–Fort Worth metroplex.

data.title: Our Services
data.subtitle: Full-spectrum commercial real estate advisory across every asset class.

items.title: Acquisition Advisory
items.description: Identify, underwrite, and close income-producing assets aligned with your investment thesis.

items.title: Portfolio Management
items.description: Maximize NOI and long-term value across your commercial portfolio.

items.title: Tenant Representation
items.description: Secure favorable lease terms in competitive DFW submarkets.

items.title: Landlord Representation
items.description: Position your property for maximum occupancy and rent growth.

items.title: Site Selection
items.description: Data-driven location analysis for retail, industrial, and corporate campuses.

items.title: Due Diligence
items.description: Comprehensive market, physical, and financial review before you commit.

data.title: Our Process
data.subtitle: A disciplined three-phase approach to every transaction.

steps.title: Initial Assessment
steps.description: We review your objectives, constraints, and market position before recommending a strategy.

steps.title: Market Analysis
steps.description: Deep-dive into comparable transactions, absorption rates, and submarket trends to establish precise valuation.

steps.title: Transaction Execution
steps.description: Negotiation, due diligence coordination, and closing management — delivered with institutional precision.

data.title: Recent Transactions
data.subtitle: Selected from 450+ closed deals across the DFW metroplex.

items.text: Robert's market intelligence and negotiation acumen delivered a portfolio acquisition that exceeded our return targets by 14%. Exceptional advisory from start to close.
Chen Commercial Group managed our 95,000 SF industrial disposition with unmatched professionalism. They surfaced qualified buyers we hadn't considered and closed above asking.
We relied on Robert for site selection across three DFW submarkets. His data-driven approach identified a Plano medical campus that fit our expansion model perfectly.

data.title: What's Your Property Worth?
data.subtitle: Complimentary commercial valuation and market analysis.
data.description: Receive a detailed commercial market analysis — comparable transactions, submarket trends, and a preliminary valuation. **No obligation. 48-hour turnaround.**

data.title: About Robert Chen
bio: Robert Chen is Senior Vice President at Chen Commercial Group, a DFW-based commercial real estate advisory firm specializing in office, retail, industrial, and mixed-use assets. With $1.8B in career transaction volume and over 450 closed deals, Robert brings institutional-grade rigor to every engagement.

A CCIM Designee and SIOR Member, Robert's market coverage spans all major DFW submarkets — from Uptown Dallas to Alliance Fort Worth. His clients include private equity funds, family offices, healthcare systems, and publicly traded REITs.
Fluent in English and Mandarin, Robert frequently advises international investors on U.S. commercial real estate entry strategies.

thank_you.heading: Thank You for Your Inquiry
thank_you.subheading: Your Commercial Valuation Request Has Been Received
thank_you.body: Robert Chen will contact you within 48 hours with a preliminary commercial market analysis for your property.
thank_you.disclaimer: This analysis is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) for informational purposes and does not constitute an appraisal.
